title: adenandra umbellata
intro: Adenandra umbellata, also known as the yellow adenandra, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. The herbal preparations of Adenandra umbellata include infusions, decoctions, and essential oil extracts, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and topical applications for various health conditions.
